description: Product Description GJKNX Laptop Battery for Dell Latitute Complying with the CE/FCC/ROHS/UL Certified Standard. Shipped from Amazon warehouse. New GJKNX Replacement Laptop Battery Compatible with numbers: GJKNX / GD1JP / 5YHR4 / 93FTF / 83XPC / D4CMT / 4YFVG / 3DDDG / 03VC9Y / 3VC9Y / 00JWGP / 0JWGP / FPT1C / DV9NT / D4CMT Up to 500 recharge cycles over the life of the battery. Compatible Laptop Models&Part Number Compatible Models Dell Latitude 5480 Series, Dell Latitude 5580 Series (only with M.2 storage) This battery is compatible with Latitude 5580 systems that use only a M.2 ssd storage drive. This battery is NOT compatible with 5580 systems that use a 2.5" storage drive. Compatible Models Dell Latitude 5488 Series, Dell Latitude 5490 Series Compatible Models Dell Latitude 5491 Series, Dell Latitude 5495 Series Compatible Models Dell Latitude 5590 Series, Dell Latitude 5591 Series Compatible Models Dell Latitude 5491 Series, Dell Latitude 5495 Series Compatible Models Dell Latitude E5280 Series, Dell Latitude E5288 Series Compatible Models Dell Latitude E5480 Series, Dell Latitude E5490 Series Compatible Models Dell Latitude E5491 Series, Dell Latitude E5580 Series Compatible Models Dell Latitude E5590 Series, Dell Latitude E5591 Series Compatible Models Dell Precision 15 3520 Series, Dell Precision 15 3530 Series and more How to replace your Dell GJKNX Laptop Battery? 1. Turn off your Dell GJKNX laptop and disconnect the AC adapter. 2. Release the latch or other attachment devices that hold your battery in place. 3. Slide the old battery out of its compartment or storage bay. 4. Take the replacement battery for Dell GJKNX laptop out of the box. 5. Slide it into the notch or bay. 6. Close the safety latch to lock it into place. 7. Reconnect the AC adapter and give the new battery for your Dell GJKNX notebook a full charge. Laptop Maintenance Tips 1. New battery: For use a new battery, you’d better try a few cycles of discharging to 5%. then charging up to 95%. So that it can be activated completely 2. Overuse: Do not always run out of a battery to 0%, this would make it damaged or usage life shortened 3. Charging sequence: when charging, first install the battery, then turn on the power, when fully charged, first cut off the power, then pull the power plug. 4. Long-term storage:Please store the unused battery fully charged.(Charge it once a month) Do not store at low power to prevent reduce the lifespan of a battery 5. Charger: Do not replace the laptop adapter casually. If the original adapter cannot be applied due to malfunction or damage, please replace the models, so as not to reduce the service life of the battery due to incompatibility. Usual Troubleshooting Methords For: Battery cannot be identified by your laptop or it doesn’t seem to work. Could be caused by battery loose. Please remove the battery and try to install more than once. May be due to conductive material damaged which the laptop motherboard and battery anode and cathode contact position, you can try to confirm it with your original battery. Check whether the battery drive is in normal condition, if not, download the corresponding driver software to update. Take out the battery and press the power button for about 15 seconds to consume the internal residual power (Do not connect the power cord), and then reinstall the battery. You can try several times.
